security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.anthropic.com https://graph.microsoft.com https://login.microsoftonline.com ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Daily Outlook briefing, powered by Claude.
bundle.longDescription: Hyacine aggregates your Outlook mail and calendar every morning, passes the structured data to Claude, and delivers a prioritised briefing back to your inbox.
